name: deploy
description: | Use when ready to ship — runs pre-push gates (lint, typecheck, build, tests, security sweep), commits, releases, and pushes. Standalone, never auto-invoked. Push always requires explicit confirmation. Trigger with /hyperflow:deploy, "ship it", "ready to push", "release", "cut a release", "deploy".
author: jeremylongshore
summary_zh: 一键完成上线前的代码检查、构建、测试和安全扫描，再自动提交、发布并推送，适合开发完成后想安心发版的场景，推送前会再次确认避免误操作。
